---
name: Prototyping Tools
description: 'Skilled in prototyping tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, or Sketch.'
---
## Overview

Prototyping tools are essential for quickly creating functional prototypes that allow users to test designs before final product development.

## Use Cases

- Creating interactive wireframes using Figma or Adobe XD
- Developing high-fidelity prototypes for complex interfaces
- Collaborating with designers and engineers to refine prototype designs

## Best Practices

- Always prioritize usability when designing prototypes
- Test prototypes with real users to gather feedback and iterate on design decisions
- Stay up-to-date with the latest prototyping tools and techniques to ensure proficiency
